message:
Bump to v1.0.8 — fix 2>&1 redirect classification

fd-to-fd redirects like 2>&1 were being rejected by the command
classifier, causing all agent compilation commands with stderr
redirection to silently fall through to local execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ members = [
 ]
 
 [workspace.package]
-version = "1.0.7"
+version = "1.0.8"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 authors = ["Remote Compilation Helper Contributors"]

@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ set -euo pipefail
 # Configuration
 # ============================================================================
 
-INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.7"
+INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.8"
 VERSION="${VERSION:-}"  # Set dynamically based on install mode
 REPO_URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
 GITHUB_REPO="Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
